name: Channels (消息通道)
description: 消息通道动作：给消息回应表情、发送原生贴纸，并查看已连接通道的群组。

routeSpecs.description: Add or clear an emoji reaction on a channel message.
Send a native sticker through a supported channel.
List groups, guilds, or rooms visible to configured channels.

metadata.note: Natively owns /v1/react, /v1/sticker/send and /v1/channels/groups through the Pack Runtime gate. Webhooks and core chat transport remain in the gateway.
metadata.usageSurface: Chat、Inbox 与外部渠道消息面板
metadata.example1: 在收件箱里查看已连接渠道的群组与会话。
metadata.example2: 在聊天或渠道消息里发送表情回应和原生贴纸。
metadata.example3: 让多渠道消息动作走统一权限和 Pack 启停控制。
